title: Runtime Request Schemas, Negotiation, Problem Details, and OpenAPI
description: Request types are trusted from Express generics, coercion changes meaning, unknown keys pass silently, errors expose internals, and documentation drifts from runtime behavior. Learners cumulatively produce runtime-validated documented API boundary through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Validate params, query, headers, body, content type, size, cardinality, and unknown fields before constructing a command.
Define string, number, boolean, date, enum, array, empty, repeated, and default coercion explicitly and test ambiguity.
Map stable domain and infrastructure causes to bounded RFC 9457 types, statuses, field evidence, correlation, and retry guidance.
